TuringResearch Docs

Local-first static docs. No deployment or cloud service required.

Overview Quickstart Concepts Original Repo Parity Public Demo Docs / Dashboard Plugin / MCP Split Repos Security / Privacy FAQ Roadmap

FAQ

Is The Docs Site Deployed?

No. v1.5 prepares docs deployment strategy and build hardening, but deployment remains manual and out of scope by default.

Does The Default Path Need API Keys?

No. The public demo and fake/default workflows do not require API keys.

Does TuringResearch Automatically Run Experiments?

No. Experiment runbooks and ingest expectations are generated for review; they do not run GPU jobs, remote jobs, or Modal jobs by default.

Is ARIS Implemented?

No. ARIS remains future reference only and is not in the v1.5 implementation line.
